title: festuca diandra
intro: Festuca diandra, also known as red fescue or slender fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Festuca diandra include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats.
